codeReview.summary: The refactor cleanly extracts market-refresh bookkeeping into helpers without changing the refresh control flow. Forced-failure, cooldown, partial-failure, and successful-recovery semantics remain wired through the same runtime and metrics paths, and the added characterization test covers the key externally relevant refresh outcomes and persisted ticker side effects.

summary: Reviewed the handoff, transcript skeleton, commit diff, runtime/metrics integrations, and market-refresh characterization tests for commit c4df63d94a7e4b18f61043ab1296f943b7a467b2. I did not find blocking correctness or compatibility issues; the helper extraction appears behavior-preserving and adequately characterized for the refreshed runtime path.
